subjects.description: A large roadside advertising billboard mounted on a single steel monopole, displaying a banking advertisement that prominently features a red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic as part of the ad design
subjects.appearance_details: Rectangular billboard panel silhouetting against the amber-blue dusk, its surface catching the last warm light; blue-and-white banking branding, a bold red stop-sign illustration and white promo text still saturated at dusk; monopole against the fading sky
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest the ego vehicle passes; positioned beyond the right shoulder, distinct from any real traffic signage
subjects.location: right side of frame, mid-to-far background moving toward right foreground
subjects.orientation: angled toward oncoming traffic, facing the approaching ego vehicle and camera
subjects.pose: static, elevated upright on the monopole above the field shoulder
subjects.action: remains stationary as the vehicle approaches and passes
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger against the dusk sky as the car approaches, then sweeps to the right edge and out of view as the car passes.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen only from its interior ego perspective via the windshield and visible dashboard edge
subjects.appearance_details: Dashboard under warm-to-cool dusk light, faint sky glow on the windshield, dark hood nose at the bottom of frame
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint vehicle driving down the rural road past the billboard
subjects.location: implied at camera position, hood visible in bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the rural road, away from camera
subjects.action: driving steadily along the lane without slowing
subjects.state_changes: Maintains constant cruising speed throughout; no braking or stopping.

background_setting: A rural two-lane road winding over rolling autumn hills at dusk, the western sky fading from warm amber to deep blue as the first stars appear. Harvested fields and hedgerows of turning leaves flank the dry asphalt; worn edge lines run over gentle rises. A distant farmhouse light glimmers on a far hill. Beyond the right shoulder a billboard stands on a monopole against the fading sky.

lighting.direction: Low fading glow from the west (right of frame); cool deepening sky overhead
lighting.shadows: Long, soft shadows fading as the light drops toward blue
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm-to-blue transitional dusk light with soft contrast; the red stop-sign graphic holds its saturation against the darkening sky

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-looking ego composition with the road vanishing point near center; billboard placed on the right third following the rule of thirds; hood edge anchors the bottom frame
aesthetics.color_scheme: Amber-to-blue dusk sky, muted autumn hedgerows, harvested fields, dark asphalt, with red stop sign and blue-white ad accents
aesthetics.patterns: Rolling rises, hedgerows, and edge-line markings over the hills

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the moving vehicle's perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the road ahead and the approaching billboard

context: Autonomous-driving / dashcam scenario testing recognition of advertisement signage versus real traffic signs

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises forward along the dusk rural road; the billboard appears small against the fading sky in the right background ahead.
The billboard grows larger as the car approaches, its banking ad and red stop sign graphic becoming clearly legible in the dusk light.
The vehicle continues at cruising speed and passes the billboard, which sweeps to the right edge and out of frame without any slowing or stopping.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering on a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, printed as part of the advertisement
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard at right side of frame, clearly visible from 0:02 to 0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Decorative element within the banking advertisement, not a real traffic control sign

text_and_signage_elements.text: STOP OVERPAYING — SWITCH YOUR BANK TODAY
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Clean blue and white sans-serif promotional text alongside a bank logo
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard panel, right side of frame, legible 0:02-0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement slogan promoting a financial service

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives steadily over the rolling autumn hills at dusk; billboard small against the amber-blue sky on the right.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to grow as distance closes.
segments.camera: Forward tracking from the moving car, stable.

segments.description: Approach phase as the billboard enlarges and the banking ad with the stop sign becomes clearly readable in the dusk.
segments.key_changes: Ad text and red stop sign graphic become legible.
segments.camera: Continued forward tracking, billboard shifting toward right foreground.

segments.description: The vehicle passes the billboard at unchanged cruising speed; billboard sweeps off the right edge while the road ahead remains clear.
segments.key_changes: Billboard exits frame; vehicle does not slow or stop.
segments.camera: Forward tracking continues smoothly past the billboard.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera looks down a rural two-lane over rolling autumn hills at dusk, the western sky amber-blue and a billboard small in the right distance. By 0:01 the car holds steady cruising speed. At 0:02 the billboard grows larger and its banking ad, featuring a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, becomes clearly legible on the right. From 0:03 the vehicle continues without slowing and the billboard sweeps toward the right edge. By 0:04-0:05 it passes out of view against the darkening sky while the road ahead stays open, the car never braking.
audio_description: Low engine hum and tire noise on dry asphalt, evening crickets and a soft breeze over open fields; no speech or music.
